name: io.github.Servosity/proofpoint-mcp
title: Proofpoint MCP
description: Proofpoint TAP threats, VAPs, clickers, and IOCs from your terminal, with a local threat store.

environmentVariables.name: PROOFPOINT_API_SECRET
environmentVariables.description: Set the PROOFPOINT_API_SECRET credential for the Proofpoint MCP server.

environmentVariables.name: PROOFPOINT_SERVICE_PRINCIPAL
environmentVariables.description: Set the PROOFPOINT_SERVICE_PRINCIPAL credential for the Proofpoint MCP server.
